purpose: Frozen post-event falsification case for a 12-hour pre-landfall intensity reversal.
selection_rule: Use each agency's forecast and later analysis in its native sustained-wind averaging period. Keep agency channels separate.

initial_analysis.wind_definition: maximum sustained wind near the tropical-cyclone center

forecast.wind_definition: maximum sustained wind near the tropical-cyclone center

truth.wind_definition: maximum sustained wind near the tropical-cyclone center

initial_analysis.wind_definition: maximum sustained wind near the tropical-cyclone center

forecast.wind_definition: maximum sustained wind near the tropical-cyclone center

truth.wind_definition: maximum sustained wind near the tropical-cyclone center

model_evaluation.case_reproduction_rule: Observed 12-hour change lies inside the forecast central 80% interval and the forecast median change is positive.
model_evaluation.scope: One diagnostic case. It cannot replace the storm-disjoint sealed hindcast.

gdacs_gts.authority: GDACS archive relaying original WMO/JMA/JTWC bulletins

ucar_adeck.authority: NCAR Research Applications Laboratory archive of ATCF data
